settings.title: What is it?
settings.content: Laushe's pure Desi Ghee is a nutrient-dense, traditional superfood made with fresh milk to support overall health and vitality.

settings.title: Who's it for
settings.content: Ideal for anyone looking for a wholesome, high-quality cooking fat that promotes better digestion and nutrient absorption.

settings.title: Benefits
settings.content:
Packed with nourishing fats and essential fat-soluble vitamins
Promotes smoother digestion and supports a healthy gut
Strengthens natural defenses and enhances daily vitality
Stable at high heat — perfect for everyday cooking
Prepared using the traditional bilona process for maximum nutrition
Completely pure with no added chemicals or preservatives

settings.title: How to use
settings.content:
Perfect for cooking, frying, or spreading on your favorite foods
Mix a spoonful into dal, rice, or roti to enhance taste
Consume one teaspoon on an empty stomach to support digestion

settings.heading: Pure, traditionally prepared desi ghee from high-quality milk — full of rich flavor, essential nutrients, and heritage.
settings.subheading: Supported by nature, backed by tradition.

settings.title: Pure Cow Milk
settings.desc: Sourced from grass-fed cows for rich, natural quality

settings.title: Traditional Cultures
settings.desc: Naturally fermented to develop authentic taste and aroma

settings.heading: Wholesome Daily Support
settings.step1_text: Perfect for cooking, frying, or spreading on your favorite foods
settings.step2_text: Mix a spoonful into dal, rice, or roti to enhance taste
settings.step3_text: Consume one teaspoon on an empty stomach to support digestion

settings.question: What is Desi Ghee?
settings.answer: Desi Ghee is clarified butter made from cow or buffalo milk, rich in healthy fats and widely used in traditional cooking for its nutritional benefits.

settings.headline: Unlock Traditional Health
settings.subtext: Nourish your body with pure, golden desi ghee for improved digestion and natural energy.
